Variables.Name: FadeInDistanceStart
Variables.Description:
The FadeInDistance at which to start hearing this sound.
	  If you want to hear the sound up close then setting this to 0 might be a good option.

Variables.Name: FadeInDistanceEnd
Variables.Description: The distance at which this sound has faded in completely.

Variables.Name: FadeOutDistanceStart
Variables.Description: The distance at which this sound starts fading out.

Variables.Name: FadeOutDistanceEnd
Variables.Description: The distance at which this sound is no longer audible.

Variables.Name: Volume
Variables.Description: The volume for which this Input should be played.
